summary: The chapter opens with a discussion of Meleegod's impressive victory in a character deletion bet against 13 players, highlighting his growing fame and strategic content. Inspired by Jung Hanbaek's debut as a pro gamer, the protagonist, Alley Boss, rededicates himself to becoming a pro gamer to seek revenge in Arena. After taking care of the Black Skull Guild, Alley Boss aims to pursue the main scenario and gather information on the Fourth Ms Quest, leading him to search for Black Magicians in Briggs. He is then approached by the persistent Kim Seok-juung, a powerful Liru Monk who knows the location of the Black Magicians and insists on joining Alley Boss, eventually revealing himself as the Guildmaster of the NEW WORLD Guild.
key_moments: Meleegod achieves significant exposure and profit through a successful character deletion bet fight.
Alley Boss decides to become a pro gamer for revenge after learning of Jung Hanbaek's debut.
Alley Boss encounters Kim Seok-juung, a strong Liru Monk, who offers to guide him to the Black Magicians.
Alley Boss and Kim Seok-juung form a temporary party and head towards the Black Magicians' hideout.
Kim Seok-juung is revealed to be the Guildmaster of the NEW WORLD Guild.
